concerns.text: The spec contains a surviving '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]' marker in the 'Assumptions' section: 'if a specific variable is missing, a [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] will be raised.' Per the kickback instructions, a converged spec must have NO surviving [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers. The reviser must resolve this by either confirming data availability for all required variables (traffic, land use, population) or explicitly defining the fallback behavior (e.g., 'exclude the variable' or 'use a proxy') without leaving a placeholder.
